summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No canonical was selected because the job is explicitly not a dedupe cluster. Open security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling; unrelated non-security PRs are kept for normal maintainer/backlog handling. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, fix artifacts, or close actions are planned.
